Description: Tumerok Insignia tier line — custom WCIDs 850362-850365. Clones from 3695 (Gold Tumerok Insignia); MirrorEmoteFromWcid 3695. Base item renamed from 'Gold Tumerok Insignia' to 'Tumerok Insignia'. Blue IconUnderlay 100676435 + black number overlays 1-4.

Weenies.Notes: Regular tier (custom). Frost (128) glow. Overlay '1' top-right black (100690976). Base name stripped of 'Gold' prefix.

PropertiesString.Name: Tumerok Insignia
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Turn this item in to Collector Vaetha (810003) in the Town Network for experience and pyreal rewards.

Weenies.Notes: Quality tier. Acid (256) glow. Overlay '2' top-right black (100690977).

PropertiesString.Name: Tumerok Insignia (Quality)
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Turn this item in to Collector Vaetha (810003) in the Town Network for experience and pyreal rewards.

Weenies.Notes: Pristine tier. Magical (1) glow. Overlay '3' top-right black (100690978).

PropertiesString.Name: Tumerok Insignia (Pristine)
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Turn this item in to Collector Vaetha (810003) in the Town Network for experience and pyreal rewards.

Weenies.Notes: Perfect tier. Lightning (64) glow. Overlay '4' top-right black (100690979).

PropertiesString.Name: Tumerok Insignia (Perfect)
